items.title: Three-time All-Star, former manager Garner dies
items.dek: Phil Garner, a three-time All-Star infielder who went on to manage the Astros to their first World Series appearance, has died. He was 76.
items.body: Phil Garner, a three-time All-Star infielder who went on to manage the Astros to their first World Series appearance, has died. He was 76.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Smesko says Reese will 'fit in great' with Dream
items.dek: Atlanta Dream coach Karl Smesko said Sunday that newly acquired forward Angel Reese will "fit in great," but added the team will work to improve her shooting ef
items.body: Atlanta Dream coach Karl Smesko said Sunday that newly acquired forward Angel Reese will "fit in great," but added the team will work to improve her shooting efficiency.
items.author: IriLine Desk
